title: AXMapMarker
description: Represents a marker on the map with position and optional display properties.

props.name: latitude
props.description: The latitude coordinate of the marker.

props.name: longitude
props.description: The longitude coordinate of the marker.

props.name: popupOpen
props.description: Whether the popup should be open by default.

props.name: popupCloseButton
props.description: Whether the popup should have a close button.

props.name: isLocked
props.description: If true, the marker cannot be deleted or moved/edited via draw interactions.

props.name: id
props.description: Optional unique identifier for id-based operations.

sections.title: Type Definition
sections.description: TypeScript interface definition for map markers.
